project_type: Monorepo with Next.js apps (quantneon=Pages Router, quantsync=App Router) and Fastify backends
verification_instructions: Run typecheck and lint for both apps. Do NOT run full build since it depends on other packages being built first.
setup_instructions: pnpm install at root (uses workspace protocol). Node 22 required.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install packages. Must NOT touch CI config, shared-ui, packages/brand, or any app other than quantneon/quantsync. Other agents working in parallel on build fix and brand system.
contribution_requirements: Keep changes within apps/quantneon and apps/quantsync only. Typecheck + lint must pass before completion.

key_patterns.quantneon: Pages Router (src/pages/), hooks in src/hooks/, apiClient singleton in src/services/api-client.ts, components use @quant/shared-ui (LoadingState, ErrorState, EmptyState, Card, Button, Avatar), ErrorBoundary wraps app
key_patterns.quantsync: App Router (src/app/), uses 'use client' directives, QueryProvider + AppProviders wrap children, quantSyncAPI class in src/services/api-client.ts, already has framer-motion in deps
key_patterns.shared_ui_motion: packages/shared-ui exports StaggerList, SpringButton, PageTransition, FadeIn, AnimatedList, PullToRefresh, BottomSheet, AnimatedSkeleton, ScaleOnHover, SkeletonFade - all from @quant/shared-ui or @quant/shared-ui/components/Motion
key_patterns.shared_ui_states: LoadingState (spinner/skeleton/dots variants), ErrorState (message + onRetry), EmptyState (title + description), SuccessState
key_patterns.styling: Tailwind CSS 3.4, CSS custom properties (--quant-*) for dark mode, dark class toggle
key_patterns.backend_pattern: Fastify + @quant/server-core createApp(), routes in backend/routes/, services in backend/services/, Prisma-based but in-memory for dev

directory_structure: Root monorepo with apps/ and packages/. Each app has src/ (frontend) and backend/ (Fastify). quantneon uses src/pages/ (Pages Router), quantsync uses src/app/ (App Router). Both have src/components/, src/hooks/, src/services/, src/types/.
